tasks.title: Finalize v0.1 scope and tenant model decisions
steps: Choose whether v0.1 ships sessions only or sessions plus captchas and files
Decide ownerId enforcement policy for v0.1
Record decisions in implementation notes and backlog dependencies
tasks.details: V0.1 scope finalized to sessions-only (create/refresh/release/get/list/queries + upsert sync paths). Captchas, files, profiles, credentials, extensions, and top-level utilities are deferred to v1+. Tenant policy finalized: ownerId is required for all public session actions and queries in v0.1; app wrapper provides it, component persists it, and every operation is filtered/validated by ownerId for tenant isolation. Missing ownerId is an authorization failure.

tasks.title: Initialize component skeleton and module folder structure
steps: Create src/client, src/component, and example/convex directories
Add package-level and component entry placeholder files
Prepare module files for sessions, captchas, profiles, credentials, extensions, files, and top-level actions
tasks.details: Initialized component skeleton with source/client/component entry placeholders, module folders, and example/convex scaffold for sessions-first project structure; implementation to be filled in later tasks.

tasks.title: Add TypeScript and Convex build configuration
steps: Create tsconfig and base lint/typecheck settings
Set up component-specific convex.config.ts entry settings
Verify generated artifacts paths for component build flow
tasks.details: Added initial TypeScript build configuration plus Convex component/app config wiring so generated component artifacts can be resolved from the example app.

tasks.title: Create package manifest with required dependencies and exports
steps: Set package name, versioning, scripts, and module type
Add peer dependency on convex and dependency on steel-sdk
Add exports: ., ./convex.config.js, ./convex.config, ./_generated/component.js, ./_generated/component, ./test
tasks.details: Created package manifest with required dependencies, scripts, module type, and required exports for component consumers.

tasks.title: Define Convex schema for sessions with required indexes
steps: Create sessions table with externalId, status, timestamps, and metadata
Add byExternalId, byStatus, byCreatedAt indexes
Plan optional ownerId partitioning and index alignment
tasks.details: Defined Convex schema for sessions table with status union, required timestamps/metadata fields, optional ownerId support, and byExternalId/byStatus/byCreatedAt (+byOwnerId) indexes.

tasks.title: Create shared validators and core status/type unions
steps: Define session status enum and common scalar validators
Add optional ownerId and includeRaw validators
Add reusable argument normalization helpers
tasks.details: Added shared status/type validation primitives and reusable argument normalizers for ownerId/includeRaw/session status in schema and normalize modules.

tasks.title: Implement steel client factory with boundary-safe API key injection
steps: Create helper that constructs steel-sdk client from action arg apiKey
Reject calls without key unless provided via wrapper context
Avoid env access inside component runtime
tasks.details: Implemented steel client factory with strict key validation and wrapper-side API key resolution/injection. Client actions require an API key in args; wrapper resolves from constructor option first, then process env, with deterministic injection helpers.

tasks.title: Add structured error normalization utility
steps: Normalize all raised errors to provider/message/retryable contract
Preserve status and code fields for observability
Return consistent operation names for traces
tasks.details: Added shared structured error normalization utility and applied it across sessions client and action paths so component errors consistently include provider/message/status/code/retryable/operation. Added support for preserving upstream status/code and retryability hints.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.create action with write-through upsert
steps: Call Steel sessions.create with validated args
Normalize payload into local fields
Upsert into sessions table using externalId
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.create action as a write-through action with validation, remote call, response normalization, and internal upsert by externalId. ownerId is required and includeRaw controls raw persistence.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.get and sessions.getByExternalId queries
steps: Fetch by id and by externalId
Optionally enforce ownerId filtering
Return normalized API shape
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.get and sessions.getByExternalId as component queries, with optional ownerId filtering and normalized output matching create payload shape.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.list query with status and pagination arguments
steps: Support status, ownerId, cursor, and limit arguments
Default list limit conservatively
Return stable ordering and optional continuation token
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.list query with status and pagination support (status, ownerId, cursor, and limit args). Added conservative defaults, stable ordering, and continuation token.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.refresh action and per-session reconciliation
steps: Fetch current remote state for one session
Normalize and upsert into sessions table
Return refreshed session snapshot
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.refresh action with ownerId enforcement, remote per-session state fetch, normalization, and local upsert reconciliation.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.refreshMany for bulk reconciliation
steps: Accept filters and pagination/cursor for bulk refresh
Perform partial success handling with per-item results
Continue processing after item failures while collecting failures
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.refreshMany as a bulk reconciliation action with optional status/cursor/limit filtering, per-item partial success handling, and continuation passthrough from Steel pagination responses

tasks.title: Implement sessions.release and sessions.releaseAll
steps: Add idempotent release behavior for already-released sessions
Update local status and lastSyncedAt after remote release
Allow optional bulk release by ownerId or status
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.release and sessions.releaseAll with idempotent handling, status synchronization, and optional ownerId/status scoped bulk release.

tasks.title: Implement internal sessions.upsert and getInternalByExternalId
steps: Add internal helpers for idempotent writes
Normalize raw payload only when includeRaw is enabled
Share ownerId and timestamp behavior across actions
tasks.details: Implemented internal sessions.upsert and added getInternalByExternalId query with owner-timestamp checks plus normalized write helpers so ownerId requirements and sync timestamps are shared across actions.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.computer and sessions.context actions
steps: Add validators for remote command actions
Return Steel payload directly
Avoid default persistence of heavy payloads
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.computer and sessions.context as pass-through Steel actions in src/component/sessions.ts with ownerId enforcement, command-argument validation, and direct remote payload return without persistence.

tasks.title: Implement sessions.liveDetails and sessions.events actions
steps: Add live-details and events action handlers
Return raw payload by default
Persist lightweight snapshot metadata when requested
tasks.details: Implemented sessions.liveDetails and sessions.events as owner-protected pass-through actions with raw-by-default responses; liveDetails now optionally persists a lightweight session snapshot for owner-scoped sync.

tasks.title: Create sessionFileMetadata table and session file actions
steps: Define sessionFileMetadata table with indexes by sessionExternalId and path
Implement list/uploadFromUrl/delete/deleteAll actions
Keep binary payload persistence out of default flow

tasks.title: Add captchaStates table and captcha actions
steps: Implement status, solve, and solveImage
Add captchaStates table with bySessionExternalId and bySessionExternalIdAndPageId
Persist optional status snapshots

tasks.title: Create profiles module with metadata handling
steps: Implement list/get/createFromUrl/updateFromUrl actions
Add profiles metadata table for local reactivity
Use URL-based input strategy for userDataDir

tasks.title: Implement credentials module with secret-safe persistence
steps: Implement create/update/list/delete actions
Persist only metadata and never raw credential secrets
Add tenant-aware validation where applicable

tasks.title: Implement extensions module with metadata tables
steps: Implement list/uploadFromUrl/updateFromUrl/delete/deleteAll
Persist extension metadata without binary payloads
Validate URLs and ownership ownership fields

tasks.title: Implement global files module and optional storage download flow
steps: Implement list/uploadFromUrl/delete actions
Add optional downloadToStorage action path
Persist file metadata only in default configuration

tasks.title: Add top-level steel.screenshot, steel.scrape, and steel.pdf actions
steps: Expose direct passthrough actions
Return remote response directly
Add explicit timeout/input validators

tasks.title: Build app-facing SteelComponent wrapper with runAction/runQuery/runMutation
steps: Resolve api key from options then app env at wrapper layer
Expose typed methods mirroring public component functions
Normalize options and ownerId into action args

tasks.title: Wire example Convex app and usage samples
steps: Create example schema and component invocation wiring
Add steelExample usage for session lifecycle
Demonstrate ownerId propagation and wrapper usage

tasks.title: Add register helper and test scaffolding for component actions
steps: Create src/test.ts with helper to register component in tests
Add fixtures for sessions and validation behavior
Mock Steel SDK for deterministic unit tests

tasks.title: Add component and integration test suite
steps: Add unit tests for sync, upsert, list, release idempotency
Add integration smoke tests for core session and tenancy flows
Add optional live test mode guarded by STEEL_API_KEY

tasks.title: Generate comprehensive README and API reference
steps: Document project setup, wrapper usage, and installation steps
Publish action/query matrix across sessions, files, and captchas
Document security and tenant scoping requirements

tasks.title: Prepare release pipeline and hardening checklist
steps: Add scripts for build, typecheck, and publish flow
Verify required component exports and codegen ordering
Create release checklist for npm and Convex component submission
